body.title: Comms: Public as landing tab, device names as nav tabs
body.result: checkboxes removed; device tabs show fascia stub; Public default; input/name rows hidden on device tabs (62625d46)
body.intention: I intend that opening the web UI lands on the Public channel feed with device names as clickable navigation tabs, not checkboxes.
body.description:
Currently device names (igor, librarian, granny-weatherwax) appear as checkboxes — a filter affordance. Replace with tab navigation: clicking a device name switches to that device's fascia page. Public is the default tab on page load (the town square).

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py (JS tab switching, initial active tab, channel-bar HTML)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Navigation affordance change only. Fascia page content is T-device-fascia-page. Device tabs can show a blank/stub panel for now.
**Completion criteria:** Page loads with Public feed visible; clicking igor/librarian/granny switches view (stub panel acceptable); no checkboxes in the channel row.
**Validation:** Open web UI cold — Public feed is visible without any clicks.
**Observable via:** Browser tab shows correct panel on click; no checkbox elements in channel-bar.
